staging_and_diagnosis.icd10_code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla

clinical_details:
TWR / DTT
Colonoscopy : At 13cm from insertion there was a malignant looking mass with an abnormal pit pattern suspicious features for malignancy.
mdt_outcome:
TWR / DTT
CT 29/02/2025: Mid rectal caner with associated mesorectal lymph nodes. Multiple modules within the lungs suspicious for lung metastases. Indeterminate retroperitoneal lymph nodes.
